testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: IHMS page is not displayed expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: IHMS page is not displayed expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinitions.IhmsSteps2.ihms_dashboard_page_should_be_displayed(IhmsSteps2.java:28) at ✽.IHMS dashboard page should be displayed(file:///C:/Users/intern2/git/repository/cucumber/src/test/resources/features/2_Ihms.feature:8)
